arts.ttl: USMNT transfer grades: From PSV's Ricardo Pepi and Dortmund's Gio Reyna to Holstein Kiel's John Tolkin and Austin FC's Brandon Vazquez, which Americans got it right?
arts.sum: GOAL grades every USMNT player who moved during the winter transfer window and, just as important, those who stayed For most USMNT players, the January window was just as much about the transfers that didn't happen as the ones that did.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano: Nottingham Forest Agree Last-Minute Loan Signing
arts.sum: In the latter stages of Deadline Day, Nottingham Forest have completed the loan signing of Manchester City youngster Joel Ndala.

arts.ttl: Man Utd defender Malacia close to PSV loan move
arts.sum: Dutch defender Tyrell Malacia is close to joining PSV Eindhoven on loan from Manchester United until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Transfermarkt deadline day live blog: Feyenoord consider Guilherme, González close to Man City move
arts.sum: Hello and welcome to the Transfermarkt deadline day live blog for the final day of the January 2025 transfer window. The past few weeks have had plenty of twists and turns but as we approach the...

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Man Utd to complete Deadline Day transfer
arts.sum: Tyrell Malacia is closing in on a move to PSV, VI reports, with the 25-year-old left-back, who has endured an injury-hit spell with the Premier League side, jetting across to the Netherlands to complete a deal. Manchester United are set to complete their first major transfer of a Deadline Day that has been quieter than expected at Old Trafford.
